text: You think to yourself on the possible locations of the key. You analyze all known facets of your Ex-Boss’s personality, from his breathing patterns to the tiniest inflections in his speech. After pondering deeply you leave the storage room and walk into the office. Confidence guides your steps as you walk up to the desk and take the key that’s lying there. After all, your boss left in a hurry earlier so there would’ve been no time to hide the key. You feel impressed with your own intelligence. As you unlock the safe to reveal riches, more coins and apples then you can carry within. You think about what to do next.

exit.trigger: leave town for a life of crime
use the money to start your own tavern
